scripts.dev:all: docker-compose down && supabase start && (supabase functions serve --no-verify-jwt --env-file .env & pnpm --filter @ai-trading/rainebank dev)
scripts.start:docker: supabase start && (supabase functions serve --no-verify-jwt --env-file .env & docker compose up --build)
scripts.deploy:prod: supabase db push && supabase functions deploy && supabase postgres-config update --config app.settings.edge_function_url=https://ktezlusdkqlfdwqrldtn.supabase.co
